description: Create a Python script that generates a complete PhD dissertation proposal (proposal disertasi) as a .docx file for Computer Science at ITB. The document topic is 'Governing Privacy and Security Risks in AI-Assisted Software Engineering'. The output file must be saved at phd-itb-2026/proposal_disertasi.docx.
steps: Create directory phd-itb-2026/ if it does not exist
Create a Python script (generate_proposal.py) at the workspace root that uses python-docx to generate the proposal
Set document formatting: Times New Roman 12pt, 1.5 line spacing, A4 paper, proper margins (4cm left, 3cm top/bottom/right per ITB standard)

Create cover/title page with: title 'PROPOSAL DISERTASI', full title of research in Indonesian, author placeholder, Program Studi Doktor Informatika, Fakultas Informatika, Institut Teknologi Bandung, year 2026

Create BAB I PENDAHULUAN with subsections: 1.1 Latar Belakang (comprehensive background on AI in SE, privacy/security risks, governance gap), 1.2 Rumusan Masalah (4 problem statements), 1.3 Pertanyaan Penelitian (RQ1-RQ4 as specified), 1.4 Tujuan Penelitian (general and specific objectives), 1.5 Manfaat Penelitian (theoretical and practical benefits), 1.6 Ruang Lingkup (scope inclusions and exclusions)

Create BAB II TINJAUAN PUSTAKA with subsections: 2.1 AI-Assisted Software Engineering, 2.2 Security Risks in AI-Assisted Development (code risks, infrastructure risks, AI risks), 2.3 Privacy Risks (source code disclosure, data leakage, training-data exposure, cross-border issues), 2.4 Governance Theory (NIST AI RMF, ISO 27001, Software Governance, AI Governance), 2.5 Penelitian Terdahulu (table of minimum 25 real published papers with Author, Focus, Method, Findings, Gap columns), 2.6 Kerangka Konseptual

Create BAB III METODOLOGI PENELITIAN with subsections: 3.1 Desain Penelitian (Mixed Methods + Design Science Research), 3.2 Tahap 1 Systematic Literature Review, 3.3 Tahap 2 Studi Empiris (interviews + survey), 3.4 Tahap 3 Pengembangan Framework (DSR methodology), 3.5 Tahap 4 Evaluasi (case study, expert validation, metrics), 3.6 Jadwal Penelitian (3-year Gantt-style table)
Create BAB IV KEBARUAN DAN ORISINALITAS with 3 novelty claims and an originality statement

Create BAB V DAFTAR PUSTAKA with 60-80 REAL, VERIFIABLE references formatted in APA/IEEE style. References must include real authors, real titles, real venues, real years (predominantly 2020-2025). Include papers from: ACM CCS, IEEE S&P, USENIX Security, ICSE, FSE, ASE, TOSEM, TSE, Nature, Science, NeurIPS, AAAI, and top journals.
Ensure all in-text citations in BAB I-IV reference entries that exist in BAB V DAFTAR PUSTAKA
Run the script to generate the .docx file and verify it exists
acceptance_criteria: File phd-itb-2026/proposal_disertasi.docx exists and is a valid .docx file
Document uses Times New Roman 12pt font throughout body text
All BABs (I through V) are present with proper heading numbering
Tinjauan Pustaka contains a table with at least 25 real papers
Daftar Pustaka contains at least 60 real, verifiable references
References are real published papers - no hallucinated authors or titles
Document is in Bahasa Indonesia (except for English technical terms and reference titles)
Jadwal Penelitian table is present showing 3-year timeline
The script runs without errors and produces the .docx file
verification: Run: python3 -c "from docx import Document; doc = Document('phd-itb-2026/proposal_disertasi.docx'); print(f'Paragraphs: {len(doc.paragraphs)}'); [print(p.text[:80]) for p in doc.paragraphs if p.style.name.startswith('Heading')]"
Verify file size is reasonable (> 50KB for a comprehensive proposal)
